## Checklist

- [ ] All frontmatter fields present (`argument-hint`, `allowed-tools`, etc.)

- [ ] No secrets or personal data included
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention (`feat:`, `improve:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
